title: ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK USB-C and Mini-HDMI 15.6in Portable Monitor Review
author: Sam Sabinash
text:
Mobile

FacebookXPinterestLinkedinReddItEmailPrintCopy URL

ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK front view
The ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK is a 15.6-inch portable monitor with a 1920×1080 IPS panel, 60Hz refresh rate, dual USB Type-C inputs, and a mini HDMI input. It is a more flexible design than the older single-port ZenScreen models, with a detachable 360-degree kickstand and more conventional cabling options for travel or desk use. ASUS positions this as a mainstream portable USB monitor rather than a high-refresh or high-resolution specialty display. That makes the MB169CK interesting mostly for its physical design and input flexibility, not because it is trying to compete with the 2.5K and 180Hz portable monitors we have reviewed.
Here is the Amazon affiliate link to where we purchased this unit.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK Hardware Overview
The ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK is a 15.6-inch 16:9 IPS monitor with a Full HD 1920×1080 resolution. It has a 178-degree viewing angles, 60Hz refresh rate, 250 cd/m2 typical brightness, 800:1 typical contrast.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK second front view
Around the back, this is a different design from the MB16ACE. Instead of relying on a folding cover as the primary stand, the MB169CK uses a detachable kickstand. This kickstand is super easy to install and does not require any tools.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK rear view
Here is a look at the stand from the side. The stand gives you varying viewing angles. The monitor dimensions without the stand are 14.17in x 8.90in x 0.47in, with a listed weight of 1.72lb.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK side profile
The ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK also includes a sleeve.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK sleeve
For display inputs, the MB169CK is much more flexible than the single-port MB16ACE. This has two USB Type-C ports with DisplayPort Alt Mode support.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK USB Type-C ports
There is also a mini HDMI input.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK mini HDMI port
On the other side, ASUS includes a 3.5mm audio jack. The monitor does not have speakers built in, so this is primarily for audio passthrough.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK 3.5mm audio jack
Controls are split between an adjustment button and a power button.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK adjustment button
A USB Type-C cable is included in the box.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK USB Type-C cable
There is also a mini HDMI to HDMI.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK mini HDMI to HDMI cable
Here is the monitor with its retail box.
ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK with retail box
Next, let us see how the ASUS ZenScreen MB169CK performs.
